images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a dim interrogation room where the chair sits empty and pushed aside; on the table under a single cone of light, a large translucent panel displays an abstract code diff — rows of soft cream bars with one thin red bar marking the removed line. The investigation has moved from the person to the change. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
